_comment: Personal research intelligence aggregated from Matt's own sources: Gmail negotiations, Google Drive research docs (the NotebookLM source set), the comparison dashboard spreadsheet, and the /insights usage report. Regenerated by deep-research passes; every claim cites its source doc.

builder_intel.note: Carolinas' #1 semi-custom builder; 94% willingness-to-refer; Edgewater = 2024 Community of the Year (your research ranked it above Southbridge).
#1 America's Most Trusted 10 years running + marketed model leaseback program = the cleanest new door to knock.

builder_intel.risk_flag: Your own research: local Southbridge reviews average 1.15/5 (26 reviews) — workmanship, cheap materials, slow warranty response. National trust #2 vs local execution gap. Mitigate with independent inspection + written warranty terms before any Tri Pointe model purchase.
builder_intel.note: 94% national move-in satisfaction claim vs 1.15/5 local reviews — trust the local signal.
Not in the volume top-10 but your proven leaseback counterparty — Craig Ave terms are the benchmark.
builder_intel.risk_flag: Model sales carry no 1-year DW walk — only the 2/10 balance from original CO (Craig Ave CO: 1/3/2025). Budget the walk-through at lease end.

your_deal.property: 3912 Craig Ave, Charlotte, NC 28211 (Central Living at Craig model)
your_deal.incentive_structure: 5% of purchase price + $5,000 through approved lender
your_deal.furniture: Included (furniture + appliances) — but NO blinds ($1,177 to add) and NO washer/dryer ($1,976 to add)
your_deal.warranty: No 1-year DW walk on model sales; balance of 2/10 warranty from CO 1/3/2025; end-of-lease walk for paint/drywall touch-ups
your_deal.model_assumptions: 3%/yr appreciation, 3-yr hold, 3% selling costs, $111K total down, $500/mo extra principal (from your Investment Analysis doc)
risks_to_verify: Incentive tied to builder's preferred lender — confirm the rate tradeoff nets positive
Leaseback guaranteed for all 12 months + extension option mechanics in writing
Rent paid monthly vs credited upfront; taxability of leaseback income
Who pays HOA, utilities, insurance, taxes, maintenance during leaseback
Lender allows 12-month leaseback; owner-occupied vs investment classification
Whether comparable townhomes get similar incentives (comps pressure)

thesis.name: Oakhurst / Cotswold value-gap thesis
thesis.buy_threshold: Strong buy if effective price ≤ $380–390K after incentives (Craig Ave at $398,916 − $24,946 = $373,970 effective ✅ clears it)
thesis.resale_signal: Myers Park High assignment (Niche grade A, #6 in Mecklenburg) — verify with CMS before marketing
momentum_signals: Rezoning 2025-077 (600 N Wendover Rd) proposes 36 attached units
Oakhurst Commons mixed-use campus at 4000 Monroe Rd

index_weights.metric: Equity value (tax value vs list price delta)
Innovation (proximity to JCSU Innovation Center / The Pearl)
Tech hub (new tech business permits, 12 mo)

data_sources.name: Charlotte Open Data Portal
data_sources.use: Zoning variances & business permits via free REST API — variance spikes in 28208/28212 precede appreciation

data_sources.name: HUD User API
data_sources.use: Fair Market Rents for rent/price hold scoring

hidden_gem.research_view: $35M RAISE grant for Mobility Hubs + 2026 West Sugar Creek Playbook target — high-equity innovation play. Note: your Mallard Pointe and University-area targets sit in this same 28269 momentum zone.

negotiation_playbook.source: Your Oakhurst/Cotswold thesis doc + Craig Ave analysis
asks: PRIMARY: full 5% seller contribution as price reduction or closing-cost value
SECONDARY: preserve the separate $5,000 title/lender credit where offered
LEASEBACK: clean documentation — wear, utilities, insurance responsibility, damage, access, restoration; extension options in writing
FURNITURE: keep package included with a written inventory + condition walk-through
WARRANTY: full warranty from YOUR possession date, or written protection for model-home wear during leaseback
MARKETING LEVER: offer the 90-day AI buyer-experience pilot (microsite, AI assistant, area guide) as value-add — but never in place of hard financial concessions

best_builders_to_talk_to.why: Proven leaseback counterparty (your own contract), second model in Jon Wian's portfolio, marketing-pilot lever ready.
#1 national trust 10 yrs running + a marketed model-leaseback investor program — cleanest new door, no local risk flags in your research.
best_builders_to_talk_to.contact: Charlotte division — ask for the model home investment program sheet

best_builders_to_talk_to.why: #4 Charlotte volume (981 closings), Carolinas' #1 semi-custom, 94% refer rate, local decision-makers; your research ranked their Edgewater over Tri Pointe's Southbridge.

Most active model-sale inventory in your inbox (Archer Row, Southbridge, Oakhurst) and quarter-end flexibility — BUT your research flags 1.15/5 local reviews. Proceed with independent inspection + written warranty terms.
